message:
fix: correct crates.io publish condition in release workflow

The `if: env.CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN != ''` check was evaluating BEFORE the
step's env block set the variable, causing the condition to always be false.
Changed to `secrets.CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN != ''` which properly checks if
the secret exists.

Also: updated dependency versions via cargo update.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
